testimonials.quote: Friendly staff, clean premises, separation of dogs and cats, parking and I'm pleased with the individual care my cat received. There may be a wait, but you and your animal get the same care when it's their turn.
testimonials.author: Karen Smith

testimonials.quote: Care and understanding superb. They look after the owners as well as the pet. Customer care superb, always by all staff.
testimonials.author: Elizabeth Holden

testimonials.quote: Always been there when I needed them! Polite and helpful as always! Supportive when necessary on those sad occasions when a dog has come to the end of his or her life. Would recommend to anybody who needs veterinary help!
testimonials.author: Jonathan Green

testimonials.quote: Got an emergency appointment for my dog within two hours of calling. My dog had to stay for two nights and they took good care of him and called me regularly with updates. I felt he was in very good hands.
testimonials.author: Amalie Gjelsvik

testimonials.quote: Lovely to find such a nice vets. From the receptionists to the nurses and vets — everyone genuinely cares about the animals.
testimonials.author: Diana Purchase

services.title: Small Animal Consultations
services.blurb: Thorough consultations for dogs, cats, rabbits and small animals. Our experienced vets take the time to listen, examine and discuss your pet's health in full.

services.title: Diagnostics & Imaging
services.blurb: In-house digital X-ray and ultrasound imaging for fast, clear answers. Our in-house laboratory analyses many tests within the practice, saving you and your pet valuable time.

services.title: Surgery
services.blurb: Modern facilities and many years of experience performing soft tissue and orthopaedic surgeries on small animals, with full anaesthetic monitoring and skilled nursing care throughout.

services.title: Dental Care
services.blurb: Routine dental hygiene advice, professional scaling and polishing, and dental procedures as required. Good oral health is an essential part of your pet's overall wellbeing.

services.title: Vaccinations & Parasite Prevention
services.blurb: Routine vaccinations, boosters, microchipping, and tailored flea, tick and worm prevention to keep your pet protected through every stage of life.

services.title: Nurse Clinics
services.blurb: Our nursing team offers a range of dedicated clinics including weight management, senior cat checks, dental advice, and pre-hibernation checks for exotic pets.

services.title: 24-Hour Emergency Care
services.blurb: We run our own round-the-clock emergency service for pets. Team members are onsite at all times, providing 24-hour care and monitoring for inpatients.

services.title: Acupuncture
services.blurb: Veterinary acupuncture involves placing fine needles into specific locations on the body to reduce pain, improve recovery rates and support long-term wellbeing.

services.title: Pet Travel
services.blurb: Travel advice, documentation and preparation to help you and your pet travel safely. We can provide Animal Health Certificates and health checks for international travel.

services.title: Specialist Referrals
services.blurb: If we encounter a problem that requires specialist input, we have a wide network of referral centres and specialists to ensure your pet receives the expert care they need.

services.title: Equine Services
services.blurb: A dedicated equine team providing 24-hour ambulatory vet services for horses, ponies and donkeys across Cornwall — from routine care to specialist procedures.

sections.heading: Lameness & Pre-Purchase Examinations
paragraphs: Our experienced equine vets can investigate and diagnose lameness issues and carry out pre-purchase examinations for horses intended for a full range of uses.

sections.heading: Diagnostics & Laboratory
paragraphs: We have mobile digital X-ray and ultrasound equipment, and offer a wide range of in-house clinical pathology services including haematology, worm egg counts, urinalysis and bacteriological culture.
bullets: Gastroscopy for stomach assessment and ulcer diagnosis
Endoscopy of the upper respiratory tract

sections.heading: Surgical & Reproductive Services
paragraphs: We offer castration services for horses, ponies and donkeys under standing sedation or general anaesthetic. Our equine stud medicine service is BEVA-approved for artificial insemination with fresh and chilled semen.
bullets: Castration under standing sedation or GA
BEVA-approved AI with fresh and chilled semen

sections.heading: Vaccinations & Dentistry
paragraphs: We provide all vaccinations necessary to keep your horse safe and healthy, and offer routine dental care which is an essential part of every horse's primary care programme.

sections.heading: End of Life
paragraphs: Saying goodbye is never easy. Our aim is to support you and provide a dignified, peaceful end for your horse when the time comes.

services.title: Farm Vet Services
services.blurb: Our dedicated farm team provides advice and support across all areas of animal welfare and productivity — from dairy and beef cattle to sheep — including 24/7 emergency call-out.

sections.heading: Dairy Services
paragraphs: Comprehensive veterinary care for dairy herds to ensure optimal health and productivity, including mastitis management, fertility programmes, and routine herd health visits.

sections.heading: Beef Services
paragraphs: Veterinary services tailored for beef cattle, covering health management, disease prevention, respiratory planning, and production efficiency support.

sections.heading: Sheep Services
paragraphs: Support and advice for sheep farmers across West Cornwall, including lamb health, flock health planning, vaccinations and disease prevention.

sections.heading: TB Testing
paragraphs: Our approved tuberculin testers (ATTs) carry out bovine TB testing across Cornwall. Contact us for TB test scheduling and herd movement paperwork.

meta.defaultTitle: Rosevean Vets | Trusted 24-Hour Vets in Penzance, Cornwall
meta.description: Rosevean Veterinary Practice in Penzance has been delivering quality veterinary care since 1837. Expert pet, equine and farm animal care, 24 hours a day across Cornwall.
meta.ogDescription: Trusted vets in Penzance, Cornwall since 1837. Expert care for pets, horses and farm animals — 24 hours a day. Call 01736 362215.

footer.blurb: Rosevean Veterinary Practice has been providing compassionate veterinary care in Cornwall since 1837. Based in Penzance, our friendly team delivers the highest standards of care for pets, horses and farm animals — 24 hours a day.
footer.emergencyNote: We run our own 24-hour emergency service. Call 01736 362215 at any time for urgent pet, equine or farm animal care.
footer.bottomTagline: Trusted veterinary care in Cornwall since 1837
footer.finePrint: © Rosevean Veterinary Practice · Coombe Rd, Penzance, Cornwall TR18 3HU

hero.body: Based in Penzance, our friendly team of vets, nurses and support staff provide the highest standards of veterinary care for pets, horses and farm animals — 24 hours a day, every day.

mission.heading: Quality veterinary care for every animal, around the clock
paragraphs: Rosevean Veterinary Practice has been at the heart of West Cornwall veterinary care since 1837. Our team of experienced vets, nurses and support staff are dedicated to delivering the highest standards of care for pets, horses and farm animals.
We are proud of our RCVS-accredited status and our Cat Friendly Clinic Silver designation. With our own 24-hour emergency service, you can trust that expert help is always just a phone call away.

careClub.heading: Always here when you need us
careClub.body: Unlike many practices, we run our own 24-hour emergency service. Our team is onsite at all times, providing round-the-clock care and monitoring for inpatients. Call 01736 362215 at any hour — day or night.

location.heading: Based in Penzance, Cornwall
location.body: Our practice is at Coombe Rd, Penzance TR18 3HU. We're open Monday to Friday 8:00am–6:30pm and Saturday 9:00am–1:00pm. Our equine and farm teams travel across West Cornwall. Emergency line always open: 01736 362215.

services.gridHeading: Comprehensive care for pets, horses and farm animals
services.gridBody: From routine consultations and preventative care to specialist diagnostics, surgery, equine services and farm vet support — all backed by our own 24-hour emergency team in Penzance.

finalCta.heading: Ready to register with Rosevean Vets?
finalCta.body: Whether you have a family pet, a horse or a livestock herd, we would be delighted to welcome you to our practice. New clients are always welcome — call us on 01736 362215 or drop in to Coombe Rd, Penzance.

hero.title: Caring for Cornwall's animals since 1837
hero.intro: Rosevean Veterinary Practice is one of Cornwall's oldest and most trusted vet practices. With deep roots in West Cornwall spanning nearly two centuries, our team of vets, nurses and support staff are proud to deliver the highest standards of care for pets, horses and farm animals — 24 hours a day.

narrative.heading: Our story
paragraphs: Rosevean Veterinary Practice has been at the heart of West Cornwall for generations. Since our founding in the 1800s, we have grown from a small rural practice into a modern, full-service veterinary hospital — yet our values remain unchanged: compassionate, expert care for every animal we see.

Today, our team of clinical directors, veterinary surgeons, nurses, technicians and support staff work together to provide comprehensive care for companion animals, horses and farm animals. We are RCVS Accredited and hold Cat Friendly Clinic Silver status — recognising our commitment to reducing stress for our feline patients.

We are proud members of the VetPartners family, which allows us to invest in the very best equipment, training and facilities while maintaining the personal, friendly service our clients have come to expect.

values.title: Caring since 1837
values.text: We have been a trusted part of the West Cornwall community for nearly two centuries. Our long history reflects a commitment to care that has endured through generations of local families and their animals.

values.title: 24-hour emergency care
values.text: Unlike many practices, we run our own 24-hour emergency service with team members onsite at all times. Whenever you need us — day or night — we are here.

values.title: RCVS Accredited
values.text: Our RCVS-accredited status reflects the high standards we hold ourselves to in clinical governance, facilities, nursing care and client communication.

values.title: Three-species expertise
values.text: Whether you have a companion animal, a horse, or a livestock herd, our specialist teams have the knowledge and experience to provide the right care — under one roof in Penzance.

team.heading: Meet our team

members.name: Matthew Berriman
members.bio: Matthew leads the clinical team at Rosevean, bringing extensive veterinary expertise and a deep commitment to the highest standards of care for all animals.

members.name: Jenna Elliott
members.bio: Jenna is a senior veterinary surgeon and Clinical Director with a wide range of expertise across small animal medicine and surgery.

members.name: Fynn Stewart
members.bio: Fynn brings energy and expertise to the clinical team, working across all areas of small animal care as one of our three Clinical Directors.

members.name: Anita Rennie
members.bio: Anita is a compassionate and experienced vet, dedicated to delivering excellent clinical care for pets and their families.

members.name: Louise Moyle
members.bio: Louise leads our nursing team with dedication and skill, ensuring every patient receives exceptional care throughout their visit.

members.name: Kensa Pepperell
members.bio: Kensa keeps Rosevean running smoothly, ensuring every aspect of the practice runs to the high standards our clients expect.

members.name: Charlotte Power-Kane
members.bio: Charlotte is a skilled veterinary surgeon who brings warmth and clinical expertise to every patient she sees.

members.name: Kieren Mitchell
members.bio: Kieren is an experienced vet with a commitment to delivering the highest quality care for companion animals across our caseload.

team.note: Rosevean Vets is home to a team of over 35 dedicated vets, nurses, technicians and support staff.

hero.title: Expert care for pets, horses and farm animals
hero.intro: From routine consultations and preventative health plans to specialist diagnostics, surgery, equine ambulatory care and farm vet support — Rosevean Vets provides comprehensive veterinary services for companion animals, horses and farm animals across Cornwall.

servicesPage.processHeading: What to expect when you visit

journey.title: Get in touch
journey.text: Call 01736 362215 to book an appointment. We're open Monday to Friday 8:00am–6:30pm and Saturday 9:00am–1:00pm. For equine or farm bookings, our dedicated teams can arrange visits at your yard or holding.

journey.title: Arrive at our practice
journey.text: Find us at Coombe Rd, Penzance TR18 3HU. Our friendly reception team will welcome you and your animal, and ensure you are seen promptly by the right member of our team.

journey.title: See one of our vets
journey.text: Our experienced vets will carry out a thorough examination. Where needed, we can run in-house diagnostics, imaging and laboratory tests on the same visit to get you answers quickly.

journey.title: Ongoing care
journey.text: Our nursing team provides continuity of care and is always on hand to answer your questions. And if you ever need us out of hours, our own 24-hour emergency service means help is always available on 01736 362215.

hero.title: Year-round care with convenient monthly payments
hero.intro: Our Pet Health Plan makes it easy to keep your pet healthy throughout the year. Spread the cost of essential preventative care across manageable monthly payments and enjoy savings on additional treatments.

careClub.priceNote: Prices shown are per month. Plans cover annual vaccinations, tailored parasite prevention, one vet consultation per year, and discounts on neutering and dental procedures. Contact us on 01736 362215for details.
careClub.planHeading: What's included in the Pet Health Plan
careClub.planBody: Our Pet Health Plan covers the essential preventative care your pet needs throughout the year. Prices are fixed and paid monthly, making budgeting easier and keeping your pet protected.
careClub.planNote: Call 01736 362215 to set up a plan or ask at reception during your next visit.
benefits: Annual vaccinations protect against serious and life-threatening diseases
Regular parasite prevention keeps your pet and home safe year-round
Routine health checks allow early detection of conditions before they become serious
Dental care prevents painful tooth and gum disease from developing
Monthly payments make budgeting for your pet's health easier

hero.title: We're here for you and your animals
hero.intro: Find us at Coombe Rd, Penzance. Call us on 01736 362215 to book an appointment, ask for advice, or in an emergency — we're here 24 hours a day.

contact.emergencyBody: We run our own 24-hour emergency service. Call 01736 362215 at any time — our team is onsite and ready to help.

register.title: Register with Rosevean Vets
register.body: Whether you have a family pet, a horse or a farm, we'd be delighted to welcome you to Rosevean Vets. Call us on 01736 362215 or come and see us at Coombe Rd, Penzance.
reassurance: RCVS Accredited Practice and Cat Friendly Clinic Silver
Trusted veterinary care in Cornwall since 1837
Pet, equine and farm vet services under one roof in Penzance
Our own 24-hour emergency service — no referral needed
register.successBody: Thank you for registering with Rosevean Vets. We'll be in touch shortly and look forward to meeting you and your animals.

book.title: See one of our vets
book.body: Call 01736 362215 to book an appointment. We're open Monday to Friday 8:00am–6:30pm and Saturday 9:00am–1:00pm. For equine visits, our ambulatory team comes to you.
book.urgentNote: For emergencies outside opening hours, call 01736 362215. We run our own 24-hour emergency service with team members onsite at all times.
